name: No more shopping simulator
author: Joshi
description: This mod tries to skip the endless shopping in modded runs with close to infinite cash. While in the shop open your collection hover over a card(joker/tarot/or anything else that generates in the shop), press ctrl+shift+F and the mod should reroll until you hit set card. The only way to break the search currently is running out of money or going back to main menu.
